name: Patient 39
history: Recurrent stomachaches with anxiety/stress. Past difficulties with weight, sexuality, academic performance. Transformation during college. Reports seeking control in relationships.
intermediate_belief: If I lose control, I'll revert to my unhappy former self.
intermediate_belief_depression: My current happiness is fragile and temporary.
situation: Concern about losing positive aspects of life or returning to previous unhappy state.
auto_thought: "It's all going to fall apart. The stomachache means I'm slipping back."
behavior: Increases control behaviors (strict diet, excessive exercise), pushes partner away to test loyalty, researches symptoms online.
